OPP-01_OPP-02_combined.rationale: OPP-01 (distance) and OPP-02 (fair price) are the two pillars of the frame claim and should be executed as a single campaign, not separate initiatives. The action sequence reflects this.

PHASE_1_IMMEDIATE.objective: Finalize product positioning, proof assets, and campaign foundation

actions.action: Finalize Golf Laboratories data package — confirm exact numbers (carry distance, total distance, spin rate, launch angle) at 95mph for iON+ vs ProV1 vs top competitors. Get permission to cite in marketing.
actions.dependency: Must complete before any marketing claims go live
actions.risk_mitigation: MESSAGING_RISK — transparent data is the foundation

actions.action: Confirm final pricing ($29.99 or $34.99/dozen). This changes messaging intensity — $30 = 'half the price of ProV1', $35 = 'two-thirds with better performance.'
actions.dependency: Must lock before copy production begins

actions.action: Produce iON+ Soul.md expanded version — fill Audience Voice Samples and Cultural Context sections using Layer 2.5 gold phrases and voice of customer analysis. This is the creative brief for all downstream copy.
Build the core message engine output (Skill 01) — frame claim, mechanism, promise, Big Idea — using FINAL_HANDOFF.md as input. This produces the creative foundation all copy builds on.
Validate supply chain readiness — confirm inventory, fulfillment partner, shipping costs, and reorder lead times for golf ball physical product.
actions.dependency: EXECUTION_RISK mitigation — must complete before campaign launch

actions.action: Produce e-commerce product page using Marketing OS Engine 03 (e-comm). Lead with distance + fair price. Feature Golf Laboratories data prominently. Visual alignment system as the differentiator section.
actions.dependency: Requires core message output from Phase 1

actions.action: Produce email launch sequence using Marketing OS Engine 07 (emails). Sequence: (1) frame claim teaser, (2) Golf Laboratories data reveal, (3) price reveal + offer, (4) alignment tech feature, (5) close/urgency.
Produce ad creative using Marketing OS Engine 08 (ads). Lead angles: 'Your ball matters' (distance data), 'The $55 ball isn't worth it' (price), 'Robot tested at YOUR speed' (proof).
Soft launch to PG email list (warmest audience). PG's existing customers are the ideal first buyers — they already trust PG and are likely in the 80-95mph target range.
actions.dependency: Requires e-comm page + email sequence + supply chain confirmed

actions.action: Track email open rates, click-through to product page, add-to-cart rate, and conversion rate from soft launch. Compare to PG's historical product launch benchmarks.
Optimize ad creative based on Phase 2 performance data. Kill underperforming angles, scale winners. Test distance-lead vs. price-lead vs. proof-lead as primary hooks.
actions.dependency: Requires 2+ weeks of ad performance data

actions.action: Produce video content (VSL or product demo) using Marketing OS Engine 02 (long-form). Feature the Golf Laboratories testing footage if available. Show real golfers testing iON+ on a launch monitor.
actions.dependency: Requires customer feedback and ideally video of robot testing

actions.action: Produce advertorial content using Marketing OS Engine 09. Angle: 'The golf ball that beat ProV1 in independent testing — and costs half as much.' Target golf enthusiast publications and social.
Launch subscription/auto-ship option for repeat buyers. Golf balls are consumable — recurring revenue is the long-term play.
actions.dependency: Requires sufficient initial sales volume to justify subscription infrastructure

actions.action: Track repeat purchase rate, subscription opt-in rate, and customer lifetime value. Compare to PG's device/digital product LTV benchmarks.
Collect and publish customer testimonials. Structure as before/after switch stories (per transformation pair format). Feature specific distance gains with numbers.
actions.dependency: Requires customers who've played 3+ rounds with iON+
